enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance, unless
indicated otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: upon issuance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Commercial Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
<image>
(1) 'Accounts with survivorship clause' means joint deposit accounts styled
as 'either or survivor', or 'anyone or survivor', or 'former or survivor' or 'latter or
survivor' or any other such clause.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: <image> (1) 'Accounts with survivorship clause' means joint deposit accounts styled as 'either or survivor',

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'Apostille' means a certificate that authenticates the origin of a public
document (e.g., a birth, marriage or death certificate, a judgment, an extract of
a register or a notarial attestation).
enriched_requirements.object: the origin of a public document (e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Annual Percentage Rate (APR) means the annual cost of credit to the
borrower which includes interest rate and all other charges associated with the
credit facility.
enriched_requirements.object: credit to the borrower which includes interest rate and all other charges associated with the credit facility

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Bank induced transaction means a transaction in the account initiated by
the bank as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments,
penalties, taxes.
enriched_requirements.object: account initiated by the bank as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments, penalties, taxes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall put in place approved policies and periodic review mechanisms to
ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service.
enriched_requirements.object: policies and periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Matters relating to customer service shall be deliberated by the Board to ensure
<image>
that the instructions are implemented meaningfully.
enriched_requirements.object: Board to ensure <image> that the instructions are implemented meaningfully

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Commitment to hassle-free
service to the customer at large and the common person in particular shall be a major
responsibility of the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: of the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customer service shall be projected as a priority objective of banks along with profit,
growth and fulfilment of social obligations.
enriched_requirements.object: priority objective of banks along with profit, growth and fulfilment of social obligations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have policies for the following:
B.2.1 Comprehensive Deposit Policy
enriched_requirements.object: following: B

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall formulate a transparent and comprehensive policy setting out the rights
of the depositors in general and small depositors in particular.
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive policy setting out the rights of the depositors in general and small depositors in particular

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall cover
all aspects of operations of deposit accounts, charges leviable and other related issues
to facilitate interaction of depositors at branch levels.
enriched_requirements.object: operations of deposit accounts, charges leviable and other related issues to facilitate interaction of depositors at branch level

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such a policy shall also be
explicit regarding secrecy and confidentiality of the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: secrecy and confidentiality of the customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall formulate a comprehensive and transparent policy taking into account
their technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for clearing
arrangements and other internal arrangements for collection through correspondents.
enriched_requirements.object: transparent policy taking into account their technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for clearing arra

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy inter alia shall cover the following three aspects:
(1) Immediate Credit for Local / Outstation cheques
(2) Time frame for Collection of Local / Outstation Instruments
(3) Interest payment for delayed collection
B.2.3 Customer Compensation Policy
enriched_requirements.object: aspects: (1) Immediate Credit for Local / Outstation cheques (2) Time frame for Collection of Local / Outstation Instruments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have a Board approved Customer Compensation Policy which shall
at a minimum, incorporate the following aspects:
(1) Erroneous Debits arising on fraudulent or other transactions,
(2) Payment of interest for delays in collection,
(3) Payment of interest for delay in issue of duplicate draft, and
(4) Other unauthorised actions of the bank leading to a financial loss to customer.
enriched_requirements.object: Customer Compensation Policy which shall at a minimum, incorporate the following aspects: (1) Erroneous Debits arising on fraudu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that wide publicity is given to the above policies formulated
by it by placing them prominently on the website as well as displaying them on the
notice board of its branches.
enriched_requirements.object: is given to the above policies formulated by it by placing them prominently on the website as well as displaying them on th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also take necessary steps to keep the
customers duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it, from time to
time.
enriched_requirements.object: to keep the customers duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it, from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The customers shall be clearly apprised of the assurances of the bank on the
services provided, at the time of establishment of the initial relationship, be it as a
depositor, borrower or otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: the assurances of the bank on the services provided, at the time of establishment of the initial relationship, be it as a depos

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall constitute a Customer Service Committee of the Board and include
experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the bank to formulate
policies and assess the compliance thereof internally.
enriched_requirements.object: Committee of the Board and include experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the bank to formulate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customer Service Committee of the Board, illustratively, shall address the
following:
(1) Formulation of a Comprehensive Deposit Policy,
(2) Issues such as the treatment of death of a depositor for operations of his / her
account,
(3) Product approval process with a view to suitability and appropriateness,
(4) Annual survey of depositor satisfaction, and
(5) Triennial audit of such services.
enriched_requirements.object: Formulation of a Comprehensive Deposit Policy, (2) Issues such as the treatment of death of a depositor for operations of h

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Committee shall also examine any other issues having a bearing on the quality of
customer service rendered.
enriched_requirements.object: issues having a bearing on the quality of customer service rendered

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A detailed memorandum reviewing customer service / customer care aspects of a
bank shall be placed once in every six months to the Board of Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: every six months to the Board of Directors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Prompt
corrective action shall be initiated wherever service quality/skill gaps are noticed.
enriched_requirements.object: quality/skill gaps are noticed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have a Standing Committee on Customer Service, cutting across
<image>
various departments, which shall serve as the micro level executive committee driving
the implementation process and providing relevant feedback.
enriched_requirements.object: on Customer Service, cutting across <image> various departments, which shall serve as the micro level executive committee dr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Customer Service
Committee of the Board shall oversee and review / modify the initiatives.
enriched_requirements.object: modify the initiatives

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These two
Committees shall be mutually reinforcing with one feeding into the other.
enriched_requirements.object: one feeding into the other

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The constitution and functions of the Standing Committee shall be on the lines
indicated below:
(1) The Standing Committee shall be chaired by the CMD / CEO or the ED and
include non-officials as its members to enable an independent feedback on the
quality of customer service rendered by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: indicated below: (1) The Standing Committee shall be chaired by the CMD / CEO or the ED and include non-officials as its members to en

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The Standing Committee shall be entrusted not only with the task of ensuring
timely and effective compliance of the Reserve Bank's instructions on customer
service, but also that of receiving the necessary feedback to determine that the
action taken by various departments of the bank is in tune with the spirit and intent
of such instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: with the task of ensuring timely and effective compliance of the Reserve Bank's instructions on customer service, but also that

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The Standing Committee shall, on an ongoing basis, review the practice and
procedures prevalent in the bank and take necessary corrective action.
enriched_requirements.object: basis, review the practice and procedures prevalent in the bank and take necessary corrective action

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The Standing Committee shall submit a brief report periodically to the Customer
Service Committee of the Board on its performance during its tenure indicating, inter
alia, the areas reviewed, procedures / practices identified and simplified /
introduced.
enriched_requirements.object: periodically to the Customer Service Committee of the Board on its performance during its tenure indicating, inter alia, the are

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The Standing Committee shall act as the bridge between various departments
of the bank and the Board / Customer Service Committee of the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: between various departments of the bank and the Board / Customer Service Committee of the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall establish Customer Service Committees at branch level, which shall
also include their customers.
enriched_requirements.object: at branch level, which shall also include their customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Senior citizens, an important constituent in banks, shall
be included therein.

The Branch Level Customer Service Committee shall meet at least once a month
to study complaints / suggestions, cases of delay, difficulties faced / reported by
customers / members of the Committee and evolve ways and means of improving
customer service.
enriched_requirements.object: a month to study complaints / suggestions, cases of delay, difficulties faced / reported by customers / members of the Committee an

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Branch Level Committees shall submit quarterly reports giving inputs /
suggestions to the Standing Committee on Customer Service thus enabling the
Standing Committee to examine them and provide relevant feedback to the Customer
Service Committee of the Board for necessary policy / procedural action.
enriched_requirements.object: inputs / suggestions to the Standing Committee on Customer Service thus enabling the Standing Committee to examine the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall orient its systems and procedures towards providing better customer
service and shall periodically assess these systems and their impact on customer
service.
enriched_requirements.object: procedures towards providing better customer service and shall periodically assess these systems and their impact on customer s

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have a Board approved policy for general management of the
branches which shall include the following aspects:
(1) Providing infrastructure facilities by branches by bestowing particular attention
to providing adequate space, proper furniture, drinking water facilities, with specific
emphasis on pensioners, senior citizens, disabled persons, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: policy for general management of the branches which shall include the following aspects: (1) Providing infrastructure facilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Business posters at semi-urban and rural branches
of the bank shall also be in the concerned regional languages.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned regional languages

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(15) Clearly establishing a new product and services approval process which shall
require approval by the Board, especially on issues which compromise the rights of
the common person.
enriched_requirements.object: Board, especially on issues which compromise the rights of the common person

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(16) Appointing Quality Assurance Officers who shall ensure that the intent of policy
is translated into the content and its eventual translation into proper procedures.
enriched_requirements.object: of policy is translated into the content and its eventual translation into proper procedures

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall normally function for public transactions at least for four hours on
weekdays and two hours on Saturdays in the larger interest of public and trading
community.
enriched_requirements.object: transactions at least for four hours on weekdays and two hours on Saturdays in the larger interest of public and trading

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Extension counters, Satellite Offices, one-man offices or other special
class of branches may remain open for such shorter hours as may be considered
necessary.
enriched_requirements.object: shorter hours as may be considered necessary

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
No particular banking hours have been prescribed by law and the bank may fix,
after due notice to its customers, whatever business hours are convenient to it, i.e., to
work in double shifts, to observe weekly holiday on a day other than Sunday or to
function on Sundays in addition to the normal working days, subject to observing
normal working hours for public transactions referred to in paragraph 22 above.
enriched_requirements.object: to its customers, whatever business hours are convenient to it, i.e., to work in double shifts, to observe weekly holiday on a day other than Sunday or to function on Sundays in addition to the normal working days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall give sufficient notice to the public / its customers of its intention of
closing any of its branches / offices on a day other than a public holiday.
enriched_requirements.object: the public / its customers of its intention of closing any of its branches / offices on a day other than a public holiday

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank
shall note to avoid any infringement of any other relevant local laws such as Shops
<image>
and Establishment Act, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: infringement of any other relevant local laws such as Shops <image> and Establishment Act, etc

conditions:
if any, regarding the bank's obligations to the staff under the
Industrial Awards / Settlements
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions, if any, regarding the bank's obligations to the staff under the
Industrial Awards / Settlements, shall be complied with.

Clearing House authority of
the place shall also be consulted in this regard.
enriched_requirements.object: this regard

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall keep rural branches open on weekly market day.
enriched_requirements.object: on weekly market day

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall
have the flexibility to fix the business hours (i.e., number of hours, as well as timings)
and the weekly holidays in its rural branches to suit local requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: fix the business hours (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This may,
however, be done subject to the instructions given above.
enriched_requirements.object: subject to the instructions given above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The branch managers and other supervising officials shall ensure that the
members of the staff are available at their respective counters right from the
commencement of banking hours and throughout the prescribed business hours so
that there shall not be any grounds for customers to make complaints.
enriched_requirements.object: customers to make complaints

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Commencement of employees' working hours 15 minutes before commencement
of business hours may be made operative by a bank at branches in metropolitan and
urban centres.
enriched_requirements.object: a bank at branches in metropolitan and urban centres

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall implement the recommendation taking into account the
provisions of the local Shops and Establishments Act.
enriched_requirements.object: into account the provisions of the local Shops and Establishments Act

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that no counter remains unattended during the business
hours and uninterrupted service is rendered to the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: remains unattended during the business hours and uninterrupted service is rendered to the customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall
allocate the work in such a way that no teller counter is closed during the banking
hours at their branches.
enriched_requirements.object: such a way that no teller counter is closed during the banking hours at their branches

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All the customers entering the banking hall before the close
of business hours shall be attended to.

A bank shall extend business hours for banking transactions other than cash, up
till one hour before close of the working hours.
enriched_requirements.object: banking transactions other than cash, up till one hour before close of the working hours

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The following non-cash transactions shall be undertaken by a bank during the
extended hours, i.e., up to one hour before the close of working hours:
(1) Non-voucher generating transactions:
enriched_requirements.object: bank during the extended hours, i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such non-cash transactions to be done during the extended business hours shall
be notified adequately for information of the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: information of the customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may have evening counters at the premises of existing branches in urban
/ metropolitan centres for providing facilities to the public beyond the normal hours of
business to bring about improvement in customer service.
enriched_requirements.object: the premises of existing branches in urban / metropolitan centres for providing facilities to the public beyond the normal ho

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transactions conducted
during such extended hours of business shall be merged with the main accounts of
the branch where it is decided to provide the aforesaid facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: main accounts of the branch where it is decided to provide the aforesaid facilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall duly notify its constituents about the functions to be undertaken
during the extended banking hours through local newspapers, as also by displaying a
notice on the notice board at the branch(es) concerned.
enriched_requirements.object: about the functions to be undertaken during the extended banking hours through local newspapers, as also by displaying a

conditions:
when the
hours of business of any of the branches are extended
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, as and when the
hours of business of any of the branches are extended, the concerned clearing house
shall also be informed.

A bank may, at the discretion of its management and based on local conditions,
treat one day of the week in rural branches, as a non-public business working day, so
that the branch managers spend it exclusively in the field for visiting villages in the
command area and contacting their present and potential clientele for development
work like mobilisation of deposits, monitoring credit utilisation, recovery and providing
appropriate guidance to borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: of its management and based on local conditions, treat one day of the week in rural branches, as a non-public business working day

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The other staff at the branch shall devote the day
<image>
to keep the house keeping work up-to-date.
enriched_requirements.object: to keep the house keeping work up-to-date

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall have flexibility in fixing the non-business working days keeping
local conditions in view, especially the 'Hat' days which occupy an important place in
the rural economy, subject to sufficient notice to the public / its customers of its
intention.
enriched_requirements.object: the non-business working days keeping local conditions in view, especially the 'Hat' days which occupy an important place in the rural economy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the following instructions shall be followed in this regard:
(1) The non-public business working day shall fall between two working days.
enriched_requirements.object: regard: (1) The non-public business working day shall fall between two working days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All branches at places with population of 10,000 or less shall be treated as rural
branches.
enriched_requirements.object: branches

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) If there is preponderance of non-agricultural activity at a rural centre and closure
of the bank branch on a working day causes inconvenience, the bank may consider
such cases on merits and make an exception.
enriched_requirements.object: merits and make an exception

conditions: If Government business is transacted at a rural branch
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) If Government business is transacted at a rural branch, an exception may be
considered as indicated at (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: at (3) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall devise appropriate systems to ensure that the branch managers
play an effective developmental role by undertaking as much field work as possible by
prescribing a suitable diary wherein date-wise details of the villages visited, persons
contacted and the work done in each village shall be noted clearly.
enriched_requirements.object: ensure that the branch managers play an effective developmental role by undertaking as much field work as possible by pr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such diaries shall
be obtained and reviewed by the concerned controlling authorities on a regular basis
and during their visits to the branches.
enriched_requirements.object: by the concerned controlling authorities on a regular basis and during their visits to the branches

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the branch managers shall do advance planning say, for a quarter, in
regard to their visits to different villages and also keep the concerned controlling offices
informed in the matter.
enriched_requirements.object: for a quarter, in regard to their visits to different villages and also keep the concerned controlling offices informed in th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In particular, branch managers must ensure that harvesting
seasons are effectively used for recovery of dues.
enriched_requirements.object: are effectively used for recovery of dues

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
They shall also devote as much
time as possible on the other working days of the week for doing as much field work
as possible besides attending to the office routine.
enriched_requirements.object: time as possible on the other working days of the week for doing as much field work as possible besides attending to the office ro

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The visits to the villages shall be
systematically organised so that all the villages in the command area are covered at
least once a quarter, by meeting as many customers as possible during each such
visit taking into account the time of availability of the rural folk for such contacts.
enriched_requirements.object: that all the villages in the command area are covered at least once a quarter, by meeting as many customers as possible

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
bank shall ensure that a perceptible improvement is recorded in the working of each
rural branch as a result of introduction of one non-business working day for recovery
<image>
and healthy growth of deposits.
enriched_requirements.object: improvement is recorded in the working of each rural branch as a result of introduction of one non-business working day for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A report on the progress in implementation of the above instructions and the
effects thereof on the quality of operations of the rural branches may be placed before
the Board of Directors for review and guidance.
enriched_requirements.object: Board of Directors for review and guidance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Instructions of a customer for transfer of their account to another branch shall be
carried out immediately on receipt of, and in accordance with his / her instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: on receipt of, and in accordance with his / her instructions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It
shall be ensured that along with the balance of the account, the relative account
opening form, specimen signatures, standing instructions, etc., or the master sheets
wherever obtained, are also simultaneously transferred, under advice to the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: with the balance of the account, the relative account opening form, specimen signatures, standing instructions, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The account transfer form with the enclosures may be handed over to the
customer in a sealed cover if they so desire for delivery at the transferee branch.
enriched_requirements.object: the customer in a sealed cover if they so desire for delivery at the transferee branch

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the transferee branch shall also be separately supplied with a copy of the
account transfer letter.
enriched_requirements.object: with a copy of the account transfer letter

conditions:
When a branch receives an enquiry from a customer regarding the receipt of his
/ her account on transfer from another branch
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
When a branch receives an enquiry from a customer regarding the receipt of his
/ her account on transfer from another branch, it shall take up the matter with the
transferor branch by electronic means, in case it has not received the balance of the
account and/or other related papers even after a reasonable transit time.
enriched_requirements.object: with the transferor branch by electronic means, in case it has not received the balance of the account and/or other related papers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that depositors dissatisfied with customer service have the
facility to switch banks and thwarting depositors from such switches would invite
serious adverse action.
enriched_requirements.object: with customer service have the facility to switch banks and thwarting depositors from such switches would invite s

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have "Enquiry" or "May I Help You" counters either exclusively or
combined with other duties, located near the entry point of the banking hall, at all
branches (excluding very small branches).
enriched_requirements.object: I Help You" counters either exclusively or combined with other duties, located near the entry point of the banking hall, at all

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall display the time norms for specialised business transactions
predominantly in the banking hall.
enriched_requirements.object: for specialised business transactions predominantly in the banking hall

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall adhere to the following instructions on display of information.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions on display of information

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The minimum size of the Notice Board may be 2 feet by 2 feet as Board of such
a size would facilitate comfortable viewing from a distance of 3 to 5 meters.
enriched_requirements.object: 2 feet as Board of such a size would facilitate comfortable viewing from a distance of 3 to 5 meters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank
shall have a Comprehensive Notice Board to display information at its branches as
per the format given in Annex I.
enriched_requirements.object: Board to display information at its branches as per the format given in Annex I

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While displaying the information in the notice board, the bank shall adhere to the
following principles:
(1) The notice board shall be updated on a periodical basis and the notice board
shall indicate the date up to which it was updated (incorporated in the display
board).
enriched_requirements.object: principles: (1) The notice board shall be updated on a periodical basis and the notice board shall indicate the date up to whi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The design of the board shall be kept simple and readable while having the
discretion on pattern, colour and design.
enriched_requirements.object: readable while having the discretion on pattern, colour and design

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The notice board shall be in bilingual in Hindi speaking states and trilingual in
other states.
enriched_requirements.object: Hindi speaking states and trilingual in other states

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The notice board shall specifically indicate wherever recent changes have
been done.
enriched_requirements.object: changes have been done

conditions:
If there is a recent change in the SSI loan products offered by the
bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: If there is a recent change in the SSI loan products offered by the
bank, the information on the SSI loan products may be displayed as 'We offer SSI
enriched_requirements.object: offer SSI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the above Board, a bank shall also display details such as 'Name of
the bank / branch, Working Days, Working Hours and Weekly Off-days' outside the
branch premises.
enriched_requirements.object: as 'Name of the bank / branch, Working Days, Working Hours and Weekly Off-days' outside the branch premises

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The detailed information as indicated in Paragraph (E) of Annex I may be made
available in various booklets / brochures as decided by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: various booklets / brochures as decided by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These booklets /
brochures may be kept in a separate file / folder in the form of 'replaceable pages' so
as to facilitate copying and updation.
enriched_requirements.object: separate file / folder in the form of 'replaceable pages' so as to facilitate copying and updation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this connection, the bank may also adhere to
the following broad guidelines:
(1) The file / folder may be kept at the customer lobby in the branch or at the 'May I
Help You' counter or at a place that is frequented by most of the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: following broad guidelines: (1) The file / folder may be kept at the customer lobby in the branch or at the 'May I Help You' counte

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The language requirements (i.e., bilingual in Hindi speaking states and trilingual
in other states) may be taken into account.

(3) While printing the booklets, it may be ensured that the font size is minimum Arial
10 so that the customers are able to easily read the same.
enriched_requirements.object: font size is minimum Arial 10 so that the customers are able to easily read the same

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (4) Copies of booklets may be made available to the customers on request.
enriched_requirements.object: the customers on request

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make available the detailed information indicated in Paragraph (E)
of Annex I on its website.
enriched_requirements.object: information indicated in Paragraph (E) of Annex I on its website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be ensured that the customers are able to easily
access the relevant information from the Home Page of the bank's website.
enriched_requirements.object: customers are able to easily access the relevant information from the Home Page of the bank's website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank

deposit are not traceable, the bank shall contact the introducer, if any, who had
introduced the account holder to the bank at the time of opening of the account.

conditions: if registered
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
bank shall also contact the nominee, if registered, for tracing the customer.

The bank shall undertake special drives periodically to find out the whereabouts
of the customers, their nominees or legal heirs in respect of inoperative accounts /
unclaimed deposits.
enriched_requirements.object: to find out the whereabouts of the customers, their nominees or legal heirs in respect of inoperative accounts /

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make available the facility of updation of KYC for activation of
inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits at all branches (including non-home
branches).
enriched_requirements.object: of updation of KYC for activation of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits at all branches (including non-home branche

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall endeavour to provide the facility of updation of KYC
in such accounts and deposits through Video-Customer Identification Process (V-
CIP).
enriched_requirements.object: facility of updation of KYC in such accounts and deposits through Video-Customer Identification Process (V- CIP)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The V-CIP related instructions under Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks
- Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 shall be adhered to by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the bank

conditions: if requested by the account holder
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Additionally,
the services of an authorised Business Correspondent of the bank may be utilised for
activation of inoperative accounts as prescribed in these directions and through V-CIP
if requested by the account holder, subject to the facility of V-CIP being provided by
the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: of inoperative accounts as prescribed in these directions and through V-CIP if requested by the account holder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall activate the inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits, including
those which are under freeze by orders of various agencies like Courts, Tribunals, Law
Enforcement Agencies, only after adhering to the KYC instructions provided in
the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions,
2025 such as Customer Due Diligence (CDD), customer identification, risk
categorisation, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: / unclaimed deposits, including those which are under freeze by orders of various agencies like Courts, Tribunals, L

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that activation of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits
in CBS necessarily requires second level of authorisation by another officer at the
same or higher level (i.e., through maker and checker).
enriched_requirements.object: inoperative account / unclaimed deposits in CBS necessarily requires second level of authorisation by another officer at the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
System logs shall invariably
be maintained in case of any activity in or activation of inoperative accounts /
unclaimed deposits for concurrent audit purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: case of any activity in or activation of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits for concurrent audit purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The preservation period of such
system logs shall be as per the internal guidelines of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: internal guidelines of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall automatically intimate the inoperative account / unclaimed deposit
holders though SMS and registered email stating that on the basis of the KYC
documents submitted by them, the inoperative status of the account has been
removed.
enriched_requirements.object: account / unclaimed deposit holders though SMS and registered email stating that on the basis of the KYC docume

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The intimation shall also mention the remedial measures available to them
to report unauthorised access, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: measures available to them to report unauthorised access

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
bank shall have in place adequate operational safeguards to ensure that the claimants
in case of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits are genuine.
enriched_requirements.object: operational safeguards to ensure that the claimants in case of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits are genuine

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall
process requests for activation of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits within
three working days from the receipt of the complete application.
enriched_requirements.object: of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits within three working days from the receipt of the complete application

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest on savings accounts shall be credited on a regular basis irrespective of
the fact that the account is in operation or not.
enriched_requirements.object: regular basis irrespective of the fact that the account is in operation or not

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not levy penal charges for non-maintenance of minimum balances
in any account that is classified as an inoperative account.
enriched_requirements.object: non-maintenance of minimum balances in any account that is classified as an inoperative account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 210.No charges shall be levied for activation of inoperative accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: of inoperative accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall host the details of unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without
pin code) and Unclaimed Deposit Reference Number (UDRN)}, which have been
transferred to DEA Fund of RBI on its website, which shall be updated regularly, at
least on a monthly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without pin code) and Unclaimed Deposit Reference Number (UDRN)}, which have been transfer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank which does not have its own website shall make
available the above list of unclaimed deposits in its branches.
enriched_requirements.object: list of unclaimed deposits in its branches

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The database hosted
on the website shall provide a search option to enable the public to search for their
unclaimed deposits using name in combination with the address of the account holder
<image>
/ entity.
enriched_requirements.object: to enable the public to search for their unclaimed deposits using name in combination with the address of the account holder <

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Upon a successful search, details of unclaimed deposits shall be displayed in
a format comprising account holder's name(s), his / her address (without pincode) and
UDRN only.
enriched_requirements.object: format comprising account holder's name(s), his / her address (without pincode) and UDRN only

conditions: In case such accounts are not in the name of individuals
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case such accounts are not in the name of individuals, the search input
and result should include names of individuals authorised to operate the accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: authorised to operate the accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the account number, its type, outstanding balance and the name of the
branch shall not be disclosed on the bank's website.
enriched_requirements.object: bank's website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not allow any debit transaction in an inoperative account unless
there is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragraphs
204 to 207 above.
enriched_requirements.object: in an inoperative account unless there is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragraphs 204 t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank may also consider imposing a cooling-off period
on reactivation, with restrictions on the number and amount of transactions, as may
be applicable for newly opened accounts with the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: cooling-off period on reactivation, with restrictions on the number and amount of transactions, as may be applicable for newl

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that there is no unauthorised access to customer data
pertaining to the inoperative accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: no unauthorised access to customer data pertaining to the inoperative accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also ensure that adequate steps
are taken to prevent data theft and related misuse for fraudulent purposes.
enriched_requirements.object: steps are taken to prevent data theft and related misuse for fraudulent purposes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall provide on its website as well as at its branches, the information on
the process for activation of the inoperative account / unclaimed deposits and claiming
the balances therein.
enriched_requirements.object: as well as at its branches, the information on the process for activation of the inoperative account / unclaimed deposits and c

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Necessary claim forms and documents may be made available
for the benefit of customers.
enriched_requirements.object: the benefit of customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall conduct public awareness and financial literacy campaigns regularly
to educate the members of public about the activation of inoperative accounts /
unclaimed deposits and the prescribed procedure to claim amounts lying therein by a
depositor or his / her nominee / legal heir in case of deceased depositor.
enriched_requirements.object: financial literacy campaigns regularly to educate the members of public about the activation of inoperative accounts / un

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy and SOPs on
safe deposit locker facility / safe custody article as per the instructions mentioned
herein.
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved policy and SOPs on safe deposit locker facility / safe custody article as per the instructions mentioned h

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The existing customers of a bank who have made an application for locker facility
and who are fully compliant with the customer due diligence criteria under the Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 may be
given the facilities of safe deposit lockers / safe custody article subject to on-going
compliance.
enriched_requirements.object: of safe deposit lockers / safe custody article subject to on-going compliance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customers who are not having any other banking relationship with the bank may
be given the facilities of safe deposit locker / safe custody article after complying with
the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your
Customer) Directions, 2025 and subject to on-going compliance.
enriched_requirements.object: of safe deposit locker / safe custody article after complying with the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India (Commercia

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The due diligence
shall be carried out for all the customers in whatever rights and capacities they may
be hiring the locker.
enriched_requirements.object: all the customers in whatever rights and capacities they may be hiring the locker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall incorporate a clause in the locker agreement that the locker-hirer/s
shall not keep anything illegal or any hazardous substance in the Safe Deposit locker.
enriched_requirements.object: any hazardous substance in the Safe Deposit locker

conditions:
If the bank suspects the deposit of any illegal or hazardous substance by any customer
in the safe deposit locker
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the bank suspects the deposit of any illegal or hazardous substance by any customer
in the safe deposit locker, the bank shall have the right to take appropriate action
against such customer as it deems fit and proper in the circumstances.
enriched_requirements.object: take appropriate action against such customer as it deems fit and proper in the circumstances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall obtain recent passport size photographs of locker-hirer(s) and
individual(s) authorised by locker hirer(s) to operate the locker and preserve in the
records pertaining to locker-hirer being maintained in the bank's branch.
enriched_requirements.object: photographs of locker-hirer(s) and individual(s) authorised by locker hirer(s) to operate the locker and preserve in the r

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to facilitate customers making informed choices, a bank shall maintain a
branch wise list of vacant lockers as well as a waitlist in Core Banking System (CBS)
or any other computerised system compliant with Cyber Security Framework issued
by RBI, for the purpose of allotment of lockers and ensure transparency in allotment
of lockers.
enriched_requirements.object: list of vacant lockers as well as a waitlist in Core Banking System (CBS) or any other computerised system compliant with Cyber

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall acknowledge the receipt of all applications for allotment of
locker and provide a waitlist number to the customers, if the lockers are not available
for allotment.
enriched_requirements.object: all applications for allotment of locker and provide a waitlist number to the customers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall have a Board approved agreement for safe deposit lockers.
enriched_requirements.object: agreement for safe deposit lockers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this
purpose, the bank may adopt the model locker agreement framed by Indian Banks'
<image>
Association.
enriched_requirements.object: agreement framed by Indian Banks' <image> Association

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This agreement shall be in conformity with these revised instructions and
the directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the matter of 'Amitabha Dasgupta vs
United Bank of India' (Judgment dated February 19, 2021 in CA No.
enriched_requirements.object: these revised instructions and the directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the matter of 'Amitabha Dasgupta vs United Bank of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that any unfair terms or conditions are not incorporated in its
locker agreements.
enriched_requirements.object: terms or conditions are not incorporated in its locker agreements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the terms of the contract shall not be more onerous than
required in ordinary course of business to safeguard the interests of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: required in ordinary course of business to safeguard the interests of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of allotment of the locker to a customer, a bank shall enter into an
agreement with the customer to whom the locker facility is provided, on a paper duly
stamped.
enriched_requirements.object: with the customer to whom the locker facility is provided, on a paper duly stamped

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the locker agreement in duplicate signed by both the parties shall
be furnished to the locker-hirer to know his / her rights and responsibilities.
enriched_requirements.object: locker-hirer to know his / her rights and responsibilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Original
Agreement shall be retained with the bank's branch where the locker is situated.
enriched_requirements.object: bank's branch where the locker is situated

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There may be instances, where the agreements already executed by a bank are
at variance with the IBA Model Agreement.

In such cases, all the provisions contained
in this section, in particular paragraphs 256 to 258 on compensation policy / liability of
banks, shall continue to apply to them even if not explicitly stated in the agreements
already executed.
enriched_requirements.object: them even if not explicitly stated in the agreements already executed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in such cases, the bank shall have the option to execute
fresh agreements or revise them through supplementary agreements.
enriched_requirements.object: execute fresh agreements or revise them through supplementary agreements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The cost of
stamp paper in such cases shall be borne by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may face potential situations where the locker-hirer neither operates the
locker nor pays the rent.
enriched_requirements.object: the locker-hirer neither operates the locker nor pays the rent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank,
however, shall not insist on such Term Deposits from the existing locker holders or
those who have satisfactory operative account.
enriched_requirements.object: Deposits from the existing locker holders or those who have satisfactory operative account

conditions: If locker rent is collected in advance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If locker rent is collected in advance, in the event of surrender of a locker by a
customer, the proportionate amount of advance rent collected shall be refunded to the
customer.
enriched_requirements.object: customer

conditions:
If there is any event such as merger / closure / shifting of branch warranting
physical relocation of the lockers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If there is any event such as merger / closure / shifting of branch warranting
physical relocation of the lockers, the bank shall give public notice in two newspapers
(including one local daily in vernacular language) in this regard and the customers
shall be intimated at least two months in advance along with options for them to
change or close the facility.
enriched_requirements.object: two newspapers (including one local daily in vernacular language) in this regard and the customers shall be intimated at least t

conditions:
In case of unplanned shifting due to natural calamities or
any other such emergency situation
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of unplanned shifting due to natural calamities or
any other such emergency situation, the bank shall make efforts to intimate its
customers suitably at the earliest.
enriched_requirements.object: its customers suitably at the earliest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall take necessary steps to ensure that the area in which the locker
facility is housed is properly secured to prevent criminal break-ins.
enriched_requirements.object: ensure that the area in which the locker facility is housed is properly secured to prevent criminal break-ins

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The risks of
accessibility of an allotted locker from any side without involvement of the locker-hirer
concerned may be assessed and kept on record.
enriched_requirements.object: on record

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall have a single defined
point of entry and exit to the locker room / vault.
enriched_requirements.object: point of entry and exit to the locker room / vault

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The place where the lockers are
housed must be secured enough to protect against hazard of rain / flood water entering
and damaging the lockers in contingent situations.
enriched_requirements.object: protect against hazard of rain / flood water entering and damaging the lockers in contingent situations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The fire hazard risks of the area
should also be assessed and minimised.
enriched_requirements.object: minimised

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank, as per its policy, shall conduct
necessary engineering / safety verification regularly to identify the risks and carry out
necessary rectification.
enriched_requirements.object: safety verification regularly to identify the risks and carry out necessary rectification

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The area housing the lockers shall remain adequately guarded at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: all times

conditions: if required as per its risk assessment
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
bank shall install Access Control System, if required as per its risk assessment, which
would restrict any unauthorised entry and create digital record of access to locker room
with time log.

As per its internal security policy, the bank may cover the entry and exit
of the strong room and the common areas of operation under CCTV camera and
preserve its recording for a period of not less than 180 days.
enriched_requirements.object: exit of the strong room and the common areas of operation under CCTV camera and preserve its recording for a period of not less th

conditions:
In case any customer
has complained to the bank that his / her locker is opened without his / her knowledge
and authority
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case any customer
has complained to the bank that his / her locker is opened without his / her knowledge
and authority, or any theft or security breach is noticed / observed, the bank shall
preserve the CCTV recording till the police investigation is completed and the dispute
is settled.
enriched_requirements.object: till the police investigation is completed and the dispute is settled

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The security procedures shall be well documented and the staff concerned shall
be properly trained in the procedure.
enriched_requirements.object: the staff concerned shall be properly trained in the procedure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The internal auditors shall verify and report the
compliance to ensure that the procedures are strictly adhered to.
enriched_requirements.object: compliance to ensure that the procedures are strictly adhered to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All the new mechanical lockers to be installed by the bank shall conform to basic
standards / benchmarks for safety and security as prescribed by Bureau of Indian
Standards (BIS) or any other enhanced industry standards applicable in this regard.
enriched_requirements.object: / benchmarks for safety and security as prescribed by Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) or any other enhanced industry stand

conditions: In case the lockers are being operated through an electronic system
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
233.In case the lockers are being operated through an electronic system, the bank
shall take reasonable steps to ensure that the system is protected against hacking or
any breach of security.
enriched_requirements.object: ensure that the system is protected against hacking or any breach of security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The customers' personal data, including their biometric data,
shall not be shared with third parties without their consent.
enriched_requirements.object: parties without their consent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall
ensure that the electronically operated lockers are compliant with the Cyber Security
Framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: operated lockers are compliant with the Cyber Security Framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The system shall be capable of
maintaining unalterable log of locker activities.
enriched_requirements.object: unalterable log of locker activities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall comply with the relevant
statutory / regulatory instructions / requirements applicable for IT / data protection.
enriched_requirements.object: statutory / regulatory instructions / requirements applicable for IT / data protection

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall also devise a standard operating procedure for issue of new
password in lieu of lost passwords to customers in a safe and secure manner in case
of electronically operated lockers.
enriched_requirements.object: operating procedure for issue of new password in lieu of lost passwords to customers in a safe and secure manner in case of ele

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that identification code of the bank / branch is embossed
on all the locker keys with a view to facilitating identification of lockers / locker
ownership by law enforcement agencies in case of need.
enriched_requirements.object: of the bank / branch is embossed on all the locker keys with a view to facilitating identification of lockers / locker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the custodian of the
locker shall, regularly / periodically, check the keys maintained in the branch to ensure
that they are in proper condition.
enriched_requirements.object: check the keys maintained in the branch to ensure that they are in proper condition

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall permit the locker-hirer to operate the
locker only with the key provided by the bank, although there is no restriction in
allowing the customer to use an additional padlock of her / his own if there are such
provisions in lockers.
enriched_requirements.object: operate the locker only with the key provided by the bank, although there is no restriction in allowing the customer to use

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The locker hirer and / or the persons duly authorised by him / her only shall be
permitted to operate the locker after proper verification of their identity and recording
of the authorisation by the officials concerned of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the locker after proper verification of their identity and recording of the authorisation by the officials concerned of the ba

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall maintain a
record of all individuals, including the locker-hirers, who have accessed the lockers
<image>
and the date and time (both check-in and check-out time) on which they have opened
and closed the locker and obtain their signature.
enriched_requirements.object: all individuals, including the locker-hirers, who have accessed the lockers <image> and the date and time (both check-in and chec

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The ingress and egress register for
access to Vault Room by locker-hirers or any other individual including the banks' staff
shall be maintained to record the movement of individuals in the Vault Room area with
their signatures at appropriate place in the records.
enriched_requirements.object: the movement of individuals in the Vault Room area with their signatures at appropriate place in the records

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank's officer authorising the locker-hirer to access the locker, after
unlocking the first key / password shall not remain present when the locker is opened
by the locker-hirer.
enriched_requirements.object: locker is opened by the locker-hirer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that there is adequate privacy to the locker-
hirers in the operations when customers access the lockers at the same time.
enriched_requirements.object: adequate privacy to the locker- hirers in the operations when customers access the lockers at the same time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall send an email and SMS alert to the registered email address and
mobile number of the customer before the end of the day as a positive confirmation
intimating the date and time of the locker operation and the redressal mechanism
available in case of unauthorised locker access.
enriched_requirements.object: SMS alert to the registered email address and mobile number of the customer before the end of the day as a positive confirmation int

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a system of inter change of locks whenever the locker is
surrendered by the hirer.
enriched_requirements.object: inter change of locks whenever the locker is surrendered by the hirer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The keys of vacant lockers shall be kept in sealed envelopes.
enriched_requirements.object: envelopes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The duplicate master keys shall be deposited with another branch of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: branch of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There
shall be proper record of joint custody of master keys.
enriched_requirements.object: joint custody of master keys

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall conduct surprise
periodic verification of surrendered / vacant lockers and their keys by an officer of the
bank who is not connected with their custody and proper record shall be maintained
as a proof of such verification.
enriched_requirements.object: of surrendered / vacant lockers and their keys by an officer of the bank who is not connected with their custod

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that the Locker Register and the Locker Key Register are
maintained in CBS or any other computerised system compliant with the Cyber
Security Framework issued by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: Register and the Locker Key Register are maintained in CBS or any other computerised system compliant with the Cyber Security F

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Locker Register shall be
updated in case of any change in the allotment with complete audit trails.
enriched_requirements.object: of any change in the allotment with complete audit trails

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank custodian shall check whether the lockers are properly closed post
locker operation.
enriched_requirements.object: are properly closed post locker operation

conditions: If the same is not done

if registered or through
SMS
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the same is not done, the lockers must be immediately closed, and
the locker-hirer shall be promptly intimated through e-mail, if registered or through
SMS, if mobile number is registered or through letter so that they may verify any
resulting discrepancy in the contents of the locker.
enriched_requirements.object: e-mail

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank custodian shall record
the fact of not closing the locker properly in the register and its closure by the bank
with the date and time.
enriched_requirements.object: not closing the locker properly in the register and its closure by the bank with the date and time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the custodian of the locker room shall carry out a
<image>
physical check of the locker room at the end of the day to ensure that lockers are
properly closed, and that no person is inadvertently trapped in the locker room after
banking hours.
enriched_requirements.object: physical check of the locker room at the end of the day to ensure that lockers are properly closed, and that no person is inadvert

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have a clear Board approved policy together with a SOP for breaking
open the lockers for all possible situations keeping in view the relevant legal and
contractual provisions.
enriched_requirements.object: approved policy together with a SOP for breaking open the lockers for all possible situations keeping in view the relevant legal an

conditions: If the key of the locker
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the key of the locker, supplied by the bank is lost by the locker-hirer, the
customer (locker hirer) shall notify the bank immediately.

conditions: if found in future
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An undertaking may also be
obtained from the customer that the key lost, if found in future, will be handed over to
the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the customer that the key lost

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All charges for opening the locker, changing the lock and replacing the lost
key may be recovered from the hirer.
enriched_requirements.object: hirer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The charges applicable for replacement of lost
keys / issue of new password shall be communicated to the locker hirer.
enriched_requirements.object: locker hirer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The operation shall be done in the presence of the customer/s and an authorised
official of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: presence of the customer/s and an authorised official of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker of a customer or
the articles left by a customer for safe custody of a bank by any Authority acting either
under the orders of a Court or any other competent authority vested with the power to
pass such orders, the bank shall co-operate in execution and implementation of the
orders.
enriched_requirements.object: implementation of the orders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall verify and satisfy itself about the orders and the connected
documents received for attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker or articles
in the safe custody of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: about the orders and the connected documents received for attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker or articles in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The customer (locker-hirer) shall be informed by letter
as well as by email / SMS to the registered email address / mobile phone number that
the Government Authorities have approached for attachment and recovery or seizure
of the locker or articles deposited for safe custody.
enriched_requirements.object: as well as by email / SMS to the registered email address / mobile phone number that the Government Authorities have approached

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An inventory of the contents of
locker and articles seized and recovered by the Authority shall be prepared in the
presence of such Government Authorities, two independent witnesses and an officer
of the bank and shall be signed by all.
enriched_requirements.object: presence of such Government Authorities, two independent witnesses and an officer of the bank and shall be signed by all

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the inventory may be forwarded to
the customer to the address available in the bank's records or handed over to the
customer against acknowledgement.
enriched_requirements.object: customer to the address available in the bank's records or handed over to the customer against acknowledgement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also record a video of the break-open process and the inventory
assessment, wherever legally permissible, and preserve the video to produce as
evidence in case of any dispute or Court or fraud case in future.
enriched_requirements.object: of the break-open process and the inventory assessment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have the discretion to break open any locker following due
procedure if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row.
enriched_requirements.object: break open any locker following due procedure if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
bank shall ensure to notify the existing locker-hirer prior to any changes in the
allotment and give him / her reasonable opportunity to withdraw the articles deposited
by him / her.
enriched_requirements.object: existing locker-hirer prior to any changes in the allotment and give him / her reasonable opportunity to withdraw the articles de

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A clause may be incorporated in the locker agreement to this effect.
enriched_requirements.object: locker agreement to this effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before breaking open the locker, a bank shall give due notice to the locker-hirer
through a letter and through email and SMS alert to the registered email address and
mobile phone number.
enriched_requirements.object: the locker-hirer through a letter and through email and SMS alert to the registered email address and mobile phone number

conditions:
If the letter is returned undelivered or the locker-hirer is not
traceable
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the letter is returned undelivered or the locker-hirer is not
traceable, the bank shall issue public notice in two newspaper dailies (one in English
<image>
and another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to any
other person/s who has interest in the contents of locker to respond.
enriched_requirements.object: two newspaper dailies (one in English <image> and another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The locker shall be broken open in the presence of an officer of a bank and two
independent witnesses.
enriched_requirements.object: the presence of an officer of a bank and two independent witnesses

conditions:
In case of electronically operated lockers (including Smart
Vaults)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of electronically operated lockers (including Smart
Vaults), the use of 'Vault Administrator' password for opening of locker shall be
assigned to a senior official and complete audit trail of access shall be preserved.
enriched_requirements.object: senior official and complete audit trail of access shall be preserved

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall also record a video of the break open process together with
inventory assessment and its safe keep and preserve the same so as to provide
evidence in case of any dispute or Court case in future.
enriched_requirements.object: of the break open process together with inventory assessment and its safe keep and preserve the same so as to provide evidence in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also ensure
that the details of breaking open of locker is documented in CBS or any other
computerised systems compliant with the Cyber Security Framework issued by RBI,
apart from locker register.
enriched_requirements.object: details of breaking open of locker is documented in CBS or any other computerised systems compliant with the Cyber Security Frame

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After breaking open of locker, the contents shall be kept in sealed envelope with
detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until customer claims it.
enriched_requirements.object: envelope with detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until customer claims it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A record of access to the fireproof safe shall invariably be maintained.

While returning
the contents of the locker, a bank shall obtain acknowledgement of the customer on
the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future.
enriched_requirements.object: customer on the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that the inventory prepared after breaking open of the locker,
is as per Annex III (effective till March 31, 2026), or Annex X (effective on or after April
1, 2026 or if implemented earlier by the bank) or as near thereto as circumstances
require.
enriched_requirements.object: prepared after breaking open of the locker, is as per Annex III (effective till March 31, 2026), or Annex X (effective on or

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall not open sealed / closed packets left with them for safe
custody or found in locker while releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker
hirers / depositor of safe custody article, unless required by law.
enriched_requirements.object: packets left with them for safe custody or found in locker while releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker hirers / depositor of safe custody article

conditions:
If the locker remains inoperative for a period of seven years and the locker-hirer
cannot be located
if rent is being paid regularly
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the locker remains inoperative for a period of seven years and the locker-hirer
cannot be located, even if rent is being paid regularly, a bank shall be at liberty to
transfer the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the
articles in a transparent manner, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: transfer the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the articles in a transparent manner, as the case ma

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before breaking open the locker,
the bank shall follow the procedure as prescribed in paragraphs 250 and 253 above.
enriched_requirements.object: prescribed in paragraphs 250 and 253 above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that the procedure to be followed by them for disposal of the
<image>
articles left unclaimed for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned above is
incorporated in their locker agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: to be followed by them for disposal of the <image> articles left unclaimed for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that appropriate terms are inserted in the locker agreement
executed with the customer specifying the position in case the locker is not in operation
for long period.
enriched_requirements.object: are inserted in the locker agreement executed with the customer specifying the position in case the locker is not in ope

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A clause may also be incorporated in the locker agreement to
discharge the bank from liability in case the locker is not in operation and the locker is
opened by the bank and contents are released as per law and as per the instructions
issued by the Reserve Bank and the terms and conditions prescribed in the
agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: the locker agreement to discharge the bank from liability in case the locker is not in operation and the locker is opened by t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall put in place a detailed Board approved policy outlining the
responsibility owed by it for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due to
its negligence as bank owe a separate duty of care to exercise due diligence in
maintaining and operating its locker or safety deposit systems.
enriched_requirements.object: detailed Board approved policy outlining the responsibility owed by it for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due to its

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall adhere to the Master Directions on Fraud Risk
Management for reporting requirements about the instances of robberies, dacoities,
thefts and burglaries.
enriched_requirements.object: Directions on Fraud Risk Management for reporting requirements about the instances of robberies, dacoities, thefts and burglaries

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not be liable for any damage and / or loss of contents of locker
arising from natural calamities or acts of God like earthquake, floods, lightning and
thunderstorm or any act that is attributable to the sole fault or negligence of the
customer.
enriched_requirements.object: damage and / or loss of contents of locker arising from natural calamities or acts of God like earthquake, floods, lightning and thu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall, however, exercise appropriate care to its locker systems to
protect its premises from such catastrophes.
enriched_requirements.object: care to its locker systems to protect its premises from such catastrophes

conditions:
where loss of contents of
locker are due to incidents mentioned above or attributable to fraud committed by its
employee(s)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As the bank cannot claim that it bears no liability towards
its customers for loss of contents of the locker, in instances where loss of contents of
locker are due to incidents mentioned above or attributable to fraud committed by its
employee(s), the bank's liability shall be for an amount equivalent to one hundred
times the prevailing annual rent of the safe deposit locker.
enriched_requirements.object: equivalent to one hundred times the prevailing annual rent of the safe deposit locker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank, with the approval of its Board, shall have a branch insurance policy to
minimise the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during
shifting / merger of branch, etc., affecting contents of lockers.
enriched_requirements.object: policy to minimise the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during shifting / merger of branch,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall clarify in its locker agreement that as it does not keep a record of
the contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein by
the customer, they would not be under any liability to insure the contents of the locker
against any risk whatsoever.
