enriched_requirements.object: agreement that as it does not keep a record of the contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall under no circumstances offer, directly or
indirectly, any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker contents.
enriched_requirements.object: directly or indirectly, any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker contents

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall display the model locker agreement with all the Terms & Conditions
and the SOPs on various aspects on its website and / or at branches (if official website
is not available) where locker facility is being provided by it for public viewing.
enriched_requirements.object: agreement with all the Terms & Conditions and the SOPs on various aspects on its website and / or at branches (if official we

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
bank shall ensure that the customers are made aware of its terms and conditions to
avail those facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: are made aware of its terms and conditions to avail those facilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall display updated information on all kinds of charges for safe deposit
lockers and safe custody articles on its website.
enriched_requirements.object: all kinds of charges for safe deposit lockers and safe custody articles on its website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall place on its website, the instructions together with the policies /
procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s) of the deceased locker hirer / safe custody
<image>
article.
enriched_requirements.object: the instructions together with the policies / procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a printed copy of the same shall also be given to the nominee(s) /
survivor(s) / legal heir(s).
enriched_requirements.object: the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, these directions are issued to
banks to implement the nomination facility and shall be read with sections 45ZA to
45ZG of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 and the Nomination Rules framed
thereunder.
enriched_requirements.object: 45ZA to 45ZG of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 and the Nomination Rules framed thereunder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall offer nomination facility in deposit accounts in accordance with the
provisions of sections 45ZA, 45ZB and 45ZG of the Act and the Rules.
enriched_requirements.object: deposit accounts in accordance with the provisions of sections 45ZA, 45ZB and 45ZG of the Act and the Rules

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall be guided by the provisions of sections 45ZC to 45ZG of the Act
and the Rules in the matter of nomination in safe deposit lockers and articles kept in
safe custody.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions of sections 45ZC to 45ZG of the Act and the Rules in the matter of nomination in safe deposit lockers and articles kept in

conditions:
if an individual is
keeping an account for his / her proprietorship business
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: For the purpose of these Directions, it is clarified that if an individual is
keeping an account for his / her proprietorship business, it will be deemed as that
individual's account and the nomination facility shall be offered in such accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of account opening, a bank shall explicitly inform the prospective
customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him / her
the option to avail the same.
enriched_requirements.object: customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him / her the option to avail the same

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also clearly explain to the prospective
customer the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to
simplification of the claim process in the event of the account holder's demise and
facilitation of smooth and prompt transfer of funds to the nominee without legal
complications.
enriched_requirements.object: the prospective customer the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to simplification of the claim p

conditions:
If the prospective customer chooses not to avail the nomination facility despite
being fully informed
if otherwise found eligible
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the prospective customer chooses not to avail the nomination facility despite
being fully informed, a bank shall proceed to open the deposit account without
<image>
imposing any restrictions, if otherwise found eligible, after obtaining a written
declaration from the individual confirming that he/ she does not require the nomination
facility at the time of account opening.
enriched_requirements.object: deposit account without <image> imposing any restrictions

conditions:
If he/she refuses to provide the written
declaration
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If he/she refuses to provide the written
declaration, the bank shall record the fact of refusal to submit written confirmation in
the account opening records.
enriched_requirements.object: refusal to submit written confirmation in the account opening records

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Under no circumstances shall a prospective customer be denied or delayed in
opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination, provided all
other requirements for account opening are satisfactorily met.
enriched_requirements.object: denied or delayed in opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination

conditions: In case of simultaneous nomination

if any nominee dies prior to receiving the
deposit from a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of simultaneous nomination, if any nominee dies prior to receiving the
deposit from a bank, the nomination in respect of such nominee alone shall become
ineffective.

Accordingly, a bank shall settle the claims of the amount of deposit made
in favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts
without nominee clause as contained in paragraphs 287 to 294 of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: the amount of deposit made in favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts without nominee clause

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have in place appropriate systems and procedures to register in its
books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the request
of the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: systems and procedures to register in its books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the r

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall devise proper systems for acknowledging the receipt of the duly
completed forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of the nomination.
enriched_requirements.object: acknowledging the receipt of the duly completed forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of the nomination

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall verify and ensure that the nomination(s) made by its customers are
in accordance with relevant provisions of the Act and the Rules before providing
acknowledgement to them.
enriched_requirements.object: the nomination(s) made by its customers are in accordance with relevant provisions of the Act and the Rules before providing ac

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such acknowledgement shall be given to the customers within three working
days of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of nomination,
irrespective of whether the same is asked for by the customers.
enriched_requirements.object: customers within three working days of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of nomination, irrespective

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where a nomination request is found not to be in conformity with the provisions
of the Act or the Rules and is consequently rejected, a bank shall inform the customer
in writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working days
<image>
of the receipt of the request form.
enriched_requirements.object: writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working days <image> of the receipt of the request for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall record the status regarding registration of nomination on the face of
the passbook / Statement of Account and TDR, with the legend "Nomination
Registered".
enriched_requirements.object: registration of nomination on the face of the passbook / Statement of Account and TDR, with the legend "Nomination Registe

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also indicate the name of the Nominee(s) in the Passbook /
Statement of Accounts and TDR in such cases.
enriched_requirements.object: of the Nominee(s) in the Passbook / Statement of Accounts and TDR in such cases

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall give wide publicity and provide guidance to deposit account holders,
locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the nomination
facility.
enriched_requirements.object: provide guidance to deposit account holders, locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the n

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This may include printing compatible messages on cheque book, passbook
and other literature reaching the customers as well as launching periodical awareness
drives.
enriched_requirements.object: on cheque book, passbook and other literature reaching the customers as well as launching periodical awareness dr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that the form for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe
deposit lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the
details of nomination, which also serves the purpose of educating the customers about
availability of such facility.
enriched_requirements.object: for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe deposit lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the

conditions:
in case of Government
savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme
(SCSS)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The directions in this section shall not be applicable in case of Government
savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme
(SCSS), Public Provident Fund (PPF), etc.
enriched_requirements.object: of Government savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme (SCSS), Public Provident Fund (PPF), e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Settlement of claims in such cases shall
be as per the provisions of the respective schemes.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions of the respective schemes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the limited purpose of directions in this section, unless the context otherwise
requires, the following definitions shall apply:
(1) 'Customer' refers to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has
placed articles in safe custody with a bank.
enriched_requirements.object: to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has placed articles in safe custody with a bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Threshold limit' means ₹15 lakh or such higher limit as may be fixed by the
bank.
enriched_requirements.object: bank

conditions:
where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the
provisions of the Banking Regulation Act

where the account was opened with
survivorship clause
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A deposit account where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the
provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or where the account was opened with
survivorship clause, the payment of the outstanding balance upon the death of the
depositor(s) to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) shall be considered a valid discharge of a
bank's liability, provided:
(1) the bank has exercised due care and caution in establishing the identity of the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) and the deceased status of the account holder(s) by
obtaining appropriate documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
enriched_requirements.object: discharge of a bank's liability

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) it has been made clear in writing to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) that they would
be receiving the payment from the bank as a trustee of the legal heirs of the
deceased depositor(s), i.e., such payment to them shall not affect the right or claim
which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the
payment made to them.
enriched_requirements.object: claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment made to them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Payment made to the nominee(s) / survivor(s), subject to the foregoing
conditions, shall constitute a full and valid discharge of the bank's liability.
enriched_requirements.object: valid discharge of the bank's liability

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore,
in such cases, while making payment to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) of the deceased
depositor(s), the bank shall not insist on production of legal documents such as
Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Probate of Will, etc., or seek any bond
of indemnity / surety from the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / third-party, irrespective of the
<image>
amount standing to the credit of the deceased account holder(s).
enriched_requirements.object: legal documents such as Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Probate of Will, etc
following documents in such cases: (1) Claim form, as given in Annex V, duly signed by the nominee(s) / survivor(s)

conditions:
where the aggregate amount
payable

in case of a joint
account
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship
to the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), a bank shall follow a simplified procedure for
settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount
payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the
threshold limit, provided
(1) a deceased depositor(s) had not made any nomination or in case of a joint
account, the account was without nominee / survivorship clause,
(2) there is no Will left behind by the deceased depositor(s),
(3) there is no contesting claim, and
(4) there is no order from a competent court in the knowledge of the bank,
restraining the claimant(s) from receiving nor the bank from making the payment.
enriched_requirements.object: for settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the threshold limit
to the threshold limit based on: (1) Claim form, as given in Annex VI, duly filled in and signed by the claimant(s) other than tho

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
No bond of surety from a third-party shall be obtained in case of claims up to the
threshold limit.
enriched_requirements.object: of claims up to the threshold limit

conditions: where claim amount is above the threshold limit
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
E.1.2.1.2 Claim amount above the threshold limit
290.In cases where claim amount is above the threshold limit, a bank shall settle the
claim based on:
enriched_requirements.object: on:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the bank shall call for the documents at paragraphs 288 (1) to
(5) above.
enriched_requirements.object: at paragraphs 288 (1) to (5) above
bond of surety, as given in Annex VII, from third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are acceptable

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased depositor on
the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in addition to
documents mentioned at paragraphs 288 (1) to (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: left behind by a deceased depositor on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in addit

conditions:
where a person
other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where a person
other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will, applicable documents
shall also be obtained from her / him.
enriched_requirements.object: her / him

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the bank shall additionally
call for the documents mentioned at paragraphs 288 (4) and (5) above.
enriched_requirements.object: documents mentioned at paragraphs 288 (4) and (5) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of contesting claims or dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and / or the
beneficiaries named in the Will of the deceased depositor, a bank shall settle claims
on the basis of Probate of Will or Letter of Administration or Succession Certificate or
Court order / decree, as applicable, and the documents mentioned at paragraphs 288
(1) to (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: basis of Probate of Will or Letter of Administration or Succession Certificate or Court order / decree, as applicable, and the do

conditions:
where there is an order from a Court restraining a bank from
making the payment
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, where there is an order from a Court restraining a bank from
making the payment, the claim shall not be entertained during the period the order is
in force.
enriched_requirements.object: period the order is in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The settlement of claim shall be considered based on subsequent Court order
to that effect.
enriched_requirements.object: subsequent Court order to that effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
No bond of surety shall be insisted from a third party in cases falling under either
paragraph E.1.2.2.1 or E.1.2.2.2 above.
enriched_requirements.object: third party in cases falling under either paragraph E

conditions:
in case any credit is received in the
name of a deceased depositor
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Post settlement of the deposit account(s), in case any credit is received in the
name of a deceased depositor, the bank shall return the same to the remitter with the
remark 'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal
heir(s).
enriched_requirements.object: the remitter with the remark 'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall incorporate a clause in the account opening form itself to the effect
that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term deposits
would be allowed without any penal charge, even if the deposit is within the lock-in-
period.
enriched_requirements.object: the account opening form itself to the effect that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term depos

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Premature termination of term deposits opened jointly, with or without
survivorship clause, shall require the consent of the surviving depositors and the legal
heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors.
enriched_requirements.object: the surviving depositors and the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors

conditions: in case of joint accounts with survivorship clause

if a specific mandate is
<image>
furnished by all the depositors jointly to the bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of joint accounts with survivorship clause, if a specific mandate is
<image>
furnished by all the depositors jointly to the bank, either at the time of placing the term
deposit or anytime subsequently during the tenure of the deposit, then premature
withdrawal option shall be allowed to the survivors on the death of any of the
depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint
deposit holder.
enriched_requirements.object: survivors on the death of any of the depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint deposit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The nominee(s) / legal heir(s) of a missing person shall be required to get an
order from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the
Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023.
enriched_requirements.object: an order from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The claim in respect of such missing person shall
be settled as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a
deceased customer.
enriched_requirements.object: the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, a copy of the court order declaring the civil death
of the account holder shall be obtained in lieu of the death certificate.
enriched_requirements.object: of the death certificate

conditions:
where the aggregate
amount payable
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, to
avoid inconvenience and undue hardship to the common person where the aggregate
amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less
than ₹1 lakh or such higher amount as may be fixed by the bank, a copy of the First
Information Report (FIR) and non-traceable report issued by police authorities shall be
obtained in lieu of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the
civil death of the account holder for settling the claim.
enriched_requirements.object: of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the civil death of the account holder for settling the claim

conditions:
If a sole locker hirer nominates an individual(s) to receive the contents in the
locker in case of her / his death
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a sole locker hirer nominates an individual(s) to receive the contents in the
locker in case of her / his death, the bank shall give access of the locker to such
nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker.
enriched_requirements.object: locker to such nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker

conditions:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures, and the locker hirers nominate any other individual(s), in the event of death
of any of the locker hirers, the bank shall give access of the locker and the liberty to
remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s).
enriched_requirements.object: locker and the liberty to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the locker was hired jointly with survivorship clause and the hirers
instructed that the access of the locker should be given to "either or survivor", "anyone
or survivor" or "former or survivor" or according to any other survivorship clause
permissible under the provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the bank shall
<image>
follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers.
enriched_requirements.object: in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers

conditions: In case of a minor nominee
when sought to be removed on behalf of the minor nominee
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of a minor nominee, the bank shall ensure that, the contents of locker,
when sought to be removed on behalf of the minor nominee, are handed over to the
guardian whose details have been provided in the nomination form.
enriched_requirements.object: of locker

conditions:
If the details of the
guardian have not been provided in the nomination form
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the details of the
guardian have not been provided in the nomination form, the bank shall hand over the
contents of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of
safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor.
enriched_requirements.object: of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor
bank for processing the claim in cases falling under paragraphs 299 and 300 above: (1) Claim form, as given in Annex V, duly signed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall, however, ensure the following before giving access to the contents
to the nominee(s) / survivor(s):
(1) Exercise due care and caution in establishing the identity of the nominee(s)/
survivor(s) and deceased status of the locker hirer(s) by obtaining appropriate
documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
enriched_requirements.object: following before giving access to the contents to the nominee(s) / survivor(s): (1) Exercise due care and caution in establishin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) Make it clear to the nominee(s)/ survivor(s) that access and liberty to remove
the contents of the locker is given to them only as a trustee of the legal heir(s) of
the deceased locker hirer(s), i.e., such access and liberty to remove the contents
given to them shall not affect the right or claim which any person may have against
the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given.
enriched_requirements.object: claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After receipt of the documents mentioned at paragraph 303 above and being
satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, the bank shall correspond with the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of
the contents of the safe deposit locker.
enriched_requirements.object: / survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall be undertaken in the presence
<image>
of the nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two
independent witnesses (should not be employee or ex-employee of the bank), the safe
deposit vault custodian and another employee of the bank not associated with locker
operations, and recorded as per the inventory form given in Annex X.
enriched_requirements.object: presence <image> of the nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two independent witnesses (sho

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall
then hand over the possession of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) /
survivor(s) / the person competent to receive the contents on behalf of the minor, as
the case may be, and obtain an acknowledgment, as given in Annex X, that all the
contents in the locker of the deceased hirer(s) have been removed and the locker is
empty, and they have no objection to allotment of the locker to any other locker hirer
as per norms of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: possession of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / the person competent to receive the contents on behalf o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Production of legal documents, viz., Succession Certificate, Letter of
Administration, Probate of Will, etc., or Bond of indemnity from the nominee(s)/
survivor(s) shall not be required unless there is any discrepancy in nomination.
enriched_requirements.object: is any discrepancy in nomination

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure, as prescribed in paragraphs 299 To 306 above, shall be followed
mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe
custody of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, inventory form given in Annex XI shall be used in such
cases.
enriched_requirements.object: cases

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship
to the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), the bank shall adopt a simplified procedure for
settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst the
legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and
(1) the deceased locker hirer(s) had not made any nomination, or
(2) the joint hirers had not given any mandate that the access may be given to one
or more of the survivors by a clear survivorship clause, or
(3) there is no 'Will' left behind by the deceased locker hirer.
enriched_requirements.object: for settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst the legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases falling under the simplified procedure, a bank shall obtain the following
documents to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as
Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Court order, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Cou

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased safe deposit
locker hirer on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in
addition to documents mentioned at paragraph 309 (1) to (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: left behind by a deceased safe deposit locker hirer on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as appl

conditions:
where a
person other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where a
person other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will, applicable
documents shall also be obtained from her / him.
enriched_requirements.object: her / him

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the bank may exercise discretion and act as per 'Will' of the deceased
without requiring production of the probate of such Will, provided the same is not
inconsistent with applicable laws, there is no dispute regarding the Will amongst the
legal heir(s) and / or beneficiaries named in the Will and the bank is otherwise satisfied
as to the genuineness of the Will.
enriched_requirements.object: as per 'Will' of the deceased without requiring production of the probate of such Will

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the bank shall additionally call for the
documents mentioned at paragraph 309 (4) and (5) above.
enriched_requirements.object: documents mentioned at paragraph 309 (4) and (5) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Cases involving dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and / or beneficiaries named
in the Will, as applicable, shall be settled based on Probate of Will or Succession
Certificate or Letter of Administration or Court order / decree, as the case may be, and
the documents mentioned at paragraph 309 (1) to (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter of Administration or Court order / decree, as the case may be, and the documen

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After receipt of the required documents in claims falling under categories at
E.2.2.1 and E.2.2.2 above and being satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, the
bank shall correspond with the claimant(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making
an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in form prescribed in
enriched_requirements.object: in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Annex X, in the presence of all claimant(s) or their duly authorised representatives,
two independent witnesses (should not be employee or ex-employee of the bank), the
safe deposit vault custodian and another employee of a bank not associated with
locker operations.
enriched_requirements.object: of the bank), the safe deposit vault custodian and another employee of a bank not associated with locker operations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Valuation of the contents of the safe deposit locker shall be carried
out by an independent valuer and recorded in the Bond of Indemnity as given in Annex
enriched_requirements.object: an independent valuer and recorded in the Bond of Indemnity as given in Annex

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The claimant(s) or their duly authorised representative(s) may remove the
contents of the locker subsequent to submission of the Bond of Indemnity.
enriched_requirements.object: the locker subsequent to submission of the Bond of Indemnity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Bond of
Indemnity shall not be required to be given in cases of claims settled on the basis of
legal documents such as Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter of
Administration or Court order / decree, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: given in cases of claims settled on the basis of legal documents such as Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter of Admi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure, as prescribed in paragraphs 308 to 313 above, shall be followed
mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe
custody of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall use the standardised forms for receiving the claims and other
documents as per the formats provided in Annex V to Annex XII.
enriched_requirements.object: for receiving the claims and other documents as per the formats provided in Annex V to Annex XII

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The standardised forms and other documents required for settlement of claims
with respect to the deposit accounts / safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody kept
by a deceased customer shall be made available in all the branches as well as on the
bank's website for the convenience of the claimant(s).
enriched_requirements.object: all the branches as well as on the bank's website for the convenience of the claimant(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall also
display on its website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and the
procedure to be followed for settlement of claims in various scenarios.
enriched_requirements.object: website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and the procedure to be followed for settlement of claims in various

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A claimant shall be allowed to lodge the claim at any of the branches against
acknowledgment.
enriched_requirements.object: the claim at any of the branches against acknowledgment

conditions:
In case all required documents for processing of the claim have
been submitted by the claimant
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case all required documents for processing of the claim have
been submitted by the claimant, a bank shall also issue a confirmation in this regard.
enriched_requirements.object: in this regard

conditions: in case of any pending or incomplete / incorrect documents
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of any pending or incomplete / incorrect documents, the bank shall
<image>
intimate the claimant about the list of such documents while acknowledging the receipt
of claim.
enriched_requirements.object: about the list of such documents while acknowledging the receipt of claim

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On subsequent submission of all the required documents, the bank shall
issue a confirmation to the claimant that all required documents have been received
for processing of the claim.
enriched_requirements.object: the claimant that all required documents have been received for processing of the claim

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank may provide the facility for online lodgement of such claims.
enriched_requirements.object: online lodgement of such claims

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Upon a
claimant uploading the claim form along with the required documents, the bank shall
send acknowledgement / confirmation through appropriate channels and also make
available the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim.
enriched_requirements.object: through appropriate channels and also make available the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, if
the bank requires the claimant to produce original documents for submission /
verification, the same shall be allowed to be done at any of its branches.
enriched_requirements.object: done at any of its branches

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall settle a claim in respect of deposit accounts of a deceased customer
within a period not exceeding 15 calendar days from the date of receipt of all the
required documents associated with the claim.
enriched_requirements.object: respect of deposit accounts of a deceased customer within a period not exceeding 15 calendar days from the date of receipt of all th

conditions: In case of safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody
enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 15
calendar days of receipt of all the required documents
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody, the bank shall, within 15
calendar days of receipt of all the required documents, process the claim and
communicate with the claimant(s) for fixing the date for making inventory of the locker
/ articles in safe custody.
enriched_requirements.object: days of receipt of all the required documents, process the claim and communicate with the claimant(s) for fixing the date for mak

conditions:
If any deposit related claim is not settled within the timeframe stipulated at
paragraph 319 above
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If any deposit related claim is not settled within the timeframe stipulated at
paragraph 319 above, then a bank shall communicate the reasons for such delay to
the claimant(s).
enriched_requirements.object: such delay to the claimant(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in cases of delay attributable to the bank, compensation shall
be paid by the bank in the form of interest, at a rate not less than the prevailing Bank
Rate + 4 percent per annum, on the settlement amount due for the period of delay.
enriched_requirements.object: bank in the form of interest, at a rate not less than the prevailing Bank Rate + 4 percent per annum, on the settlement amount due for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The reference date for reckoning the amount due and the prevailing Bank Rate shall
be the date of receipt of all required documents from the claimant.
enriched_requirements.object: receipt of all required documents from the claimant

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For claims related to safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody, the bank shall
be required to pay compensation to the claimant(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day
of delay, in cases where it doesn't adhere to the timeline prescribed in paragraph 320
above.
enriched_requirements.object: compensation to the claimant(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay, in cases where it doesn't adhere to the timeline presc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, a bank shall follow the procedure for settlement
of claims in respect of such accounts as has been prescribed above for the accounts
with / without nominee / survivorship clause, as applicable.
enriched_requirements.object: settlement of claims in respect of such accounts as has been prescribed above for the accounts with / without nominee / survi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, a bank shall accept the
original certified copy of the document issued for 'proof of death', certified in the
country of its issuance in any one of the following modes:
(1) authorised officials of overseas branches of Scheduled Commercial Banks
registered in India;
enriched_requirements.object: copy of the document issued for 'proof of death', certified in the country of its issuance in any one of the following m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall continue to spread awareness among its customers about the
benefits of the nomination facility / survivorship clause and give wide publicity to these
facilities along with the procedure for settlement of claims.
enriched_requirements.object: among its customers about the benefits of the nomination facility / survivorship clause and give wide publicity to these

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall adopt the following broad instructions and frame the Fair Practices
Code duly approved by its Board of Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions and frame the Fair Practices Code duly approved by its Board of Directors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Loan application forms shall be comprehensive in respect of all categories of
loans, irrespective of the amount of loan sought by the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: of all categories of loans, irrespective of the amount of loan sought by the borrower

conditions: if loan amount is not sanctioned / disbursed
if any, penalty for delayed repayments if any
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With a view to
bringing in fairness and transparency, the bank shall transparently disclose to the
borrower all information about fees / charges payable for processing the loan
application, the amount of fees refundable if loan amount is not sanctioned / disbursed,
pre-payment options and charges, if any, penalty for delayed repayments if any,
conversion charges for switching loan from fixed to floating rates or vice versa,
existence of any interest reset clause and any other matter which affects the interest
of the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: borrower all information about fees / charges payable for processing the loan application, the amount of fees refundable if loan amount is not sanctioned / disbursed, pre-payment options and charges

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such information shall also be displayed on the website of the bank
for all categories of loan products.
enriched_requirements.object: the website of the bank for all categories of loan products

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
bank shall ensure that all information relating to charges / fees for processing are
invariably disclosed in the loan application forms.
enriched_requirements.object: relating to charges / fees for processing are invariably disclosed in the loan application forms

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall inform 'all-in-
cost' to the customer to enable him / her to compare the rates charges with other
sources of finance.
enriched_requirements.object: the customer to enable him / her to compare the rates charges with other sources of finance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall also be ensured that such charges / fees are non-
discriminatory.
enriched_requirements.object: such charges / fees are non- discriminatory

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall devise a system of giving acknowledgement for receipt of all loan
applications.
enriched_requirements.object: giving acknowledgement for receipt of all loan applications

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While a bank is required to carry out necessary due diligence before arriving at
credit decisions, timely and adequate availability of credit is a pre-requisite for
successful implementation of large projects.
enriched_requirements.object: due diligence before arriving at credit decisions, timely and adequate availability of credit is a pre-requisite for successful

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, the bank shall clearly delineate
the procedure for disposal of loan proposals, with appropriate timelines, and institute
a suitable monitoring mechanism for reviewing applications pending beyond the
specified period.
enriched_requirements.object: for disposal of loan proposals, with appropriate timelines, and institute a suitable monitoring mechanism for reviewin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, there shall not be any compromise on due diligence
<image>
requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: due diligence <image> requirements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also make suitable disclosures on the timelines for
conveying credit decisions through its website, notice boards, product literature, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: on the timelines for conveying credit decisions through its website, notice boards, product literature, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The bank shall verify the loan applications within a reasonable period of time.
enriched_requirements.object: within a reasonable period of time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If
additional details / documents are required, it shall intimate the same to the borrower
immediately.
enriched_requirements.object: the borrower immediately

conditions: In case of all categories of loans irrespective of any threshold limits
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of all categories of loans irrespective of any threshold limits, including
credit card applications, the bank shall convey in writing, the main reason(s) which, in
the opinion of the bank after due consideration, led to rejection of the loan applications
within stipulated time.
enriched_requirements.object: main reason(s) which, in the opinion of the bank after due consideration, led to rejection of the loan applications within stip

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that there is proper assessment of credit application of the
borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: proper assessment of credit application of the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall not use margin and security stipulation as a substitute for
due diligence on credit worthiness of the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: stipulation as a substitute for due diligence on credit worthiness of the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall convey to the borrower the credit limit along with the terms and
conditions thereof and keep the borrower's acceptance of these terms and conditions
given with his / her full knowledge on record.
enriched_requirements.object: the credit limit along with the terms and conditions thereof and keep the borrower's acceptance of these terms and conditions g

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Terms and conditions and other caveats governing credit facilities arrived at after
negotiation by the bank and the borrower shall be reduced in writing and duly certified
by the authorised official.
enriched_requirements.object: and duly certified by the authorised official

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall invariably furnish a copy of the loan
agreement along with a copy each of all enclosures quoted in the loan agreement to
the borrower(s) at the time of sanction / disbursement of loan.
enriched_requirements.object: of the loan agreement along with a copy each of all enclosures quoted in the loan agreement to the borrower(s) at the time o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As far as possible, the loan agreement shall clearly stipulate credit facilities that
are solely at the discretion of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: that are solely at the discretion of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These may include approval or disallowance
of facilities, such as, drawings beyond the sanctioned limits, honouring cheques issued
for the purpose other than specifically agreed to in the credit sanction, and disallowing
drawing on a borrowal account on its classification as a non-performing asset or on
account of non-compliance with the terms of sanction.
enriched_requirements.object: of facilities, such as, drawings beyond the sanctioned limits, honouring cheques issued for the purpose other than sp

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It may also be specifically stated
that the bank does not have an obligation to meet further requirements of the
borrowers on account of growth in business etc.
enriched_requirements.object: that the bank does not have an obligation to meet further requirements of the borrowers on account of growth in business e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of lending under consortium arrangement, the participating lender
banks shall evolve procedures to complete appraisal of proposals in a time bound
<image>
manner to the extent feasible and communicate their decisions on financing or
otherwise within a reasonable time.
enriched_requirements.object: appraisal of proposals in a time bound <image> manner to the extent feasible and communicate their decisions on financin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure timely disbursement of loans sanctioned in conformity with
the terms and conditions governing such sanction.
enriched_requirements.object: loans sanctioned in conformity with the terms and conditions governing such sanction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall give notice of any
change in the terms and conditions including interest rates, service charges etc.
enriched_requirements.object: change in the terms and conditions including interest rates, service charges etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall
also be ensured that changes in interest rates and charges are effected only
prospectively.
enriched_requirements.object: changes in interest rates and charges are effected only prospectively

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Post disbursement supervision by a bank, particularly in respect of loans up to
₹2 lakh, shall be constructive with a view to taking care of any" lender-related" genuine
difficulty that the borrower may face.
enriched_requirements.object: view to taking care of any" lender-related" genuine difficulty that the borrower may face

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before taking a decision to recall / accelerate payment or performance under the
agreement or seeking additional securities, the bank shall give notice to the
borrower(s) as specified in the loan agreement or a reasonable period if no such
condition exists in the loan agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: borrower(s) as specified in the loan agreement or a reasonable period if no such condition exists in the loan agreement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall release all securities on receiving payment of loan or realisation
of loan subject to any legitimate right or lien for any other claim it may have against
the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: receiving payment of loan or realisation of loan subject to any legitimate right or lien for any other claim it may have aga

conditions: If such right of set off is to be exercised
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If such right of set off is to be exercised, the borrower(s) shall be given
notice about the same with full particulars about the remaining claims and the
documents under which the bank is entitled to retain the securities till the relevant
claim is settled / paid.
enriched_requirements.object: the same with full particulars about the remaining claims and the documents under which the bank is entitled to retain the secur

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall restrain from interference in the affairs of the borrower(s) except
for what is provided in the terms and conditions of the loan sanction documents (unless
new information, not earlier disclosed by the borrower, has come to the notice of the
bank).
enriched_requirements.object: the affairs of the borrower(s) except for what is provided in the terms and conditions of the loan sanction documents (u

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall not discriminate on grounds of sex, caste and religion in the matter
of lending.
enriched_requirements.object: sex, caste and religion in the matter of lending

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the matter of recovery of loans, the bank shall not resort to undue harassment,
<image>
viz., persistently bothering the borrower(s) at odd hours, use of muscle power for
recovery of loans, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: <image> viz

conditions: In case of receipt of request for transfer of borrowal account
enriched_requirements.timeline: within 21 days from the date of receipt of request
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of receipt of request for transfer of borrowal account, either from the
borrower or from a bank / financial institution, which proposes to take-over the account,
the consent or otherwise, i.e., objection of the lending bank, if any, shall be conveyed
within 21 days from the date of receipt of request.
enriched_requirements.object: days from the date of receipt of request

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Fair Practices Code, based on the instructions outlined in this section, shall be
put in place in respect of all lending.
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of all lending

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall have the freedom of drafting the
Fair Practices Code, enhancing the scope of the instructions but in no way sacrificing
the spirit underlying the above instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: drafting the Fair Practices Code, enhancing the scope of the instructions but in no way sacrificing the spirit underlying the abov

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the Board of the bank
shall lay down a clear policy.
enriched_requirements.object: policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of Directors shall also lay down an appropriate grievance redressal
mechanism within the organisation to resolve disputes arising in this regard.
enriched_requirements.object: appropriate grievance redressal mechanism within the organisation to resolve disputes arising in this regard

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such a
mechanism shall ensure that all disputes arising out of the decisions of the bank's
functionaries are heard and disposed of at least at the next higher level.
enriched_requirements.object: arising out of the decisions of the bank's functionaries are heard and disposed of at least at the next higher level

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of
Directors shall also provide for periodical review of the compliance of the Fair Practices
Code and the functioning of the grievance redressal mechanism at various levels of
controlling offices.
enriched_requirements.object: review of the compliance of the Fair Practices Code and the functioning of the grievance redressal mechanism at various le

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A consolidated report of such reviews shall be submitted to the
Board at regular intervals, as shall be prescribed by it.
enriched_requirements.object: Board at regular intervals, as shall be prescribed by it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The adoption of the Code, printing of necessary loan application forms and
circulation thereof among the branches and controlling offices shall also be duly
completed.

The Fair Practices Code, which shall be adopted by the bank, shall also
be put on its website and given wide publicity.
enriched_requirements.object: bank, shall also be put on its website and given wide publicity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A copy shall also be forwarded to the
Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the Reserve Bank

352.In case of existing floating rate term loans sanctioned before December 31, 2025

(1) For all floating rate loans granted for purposes other than business to

charges
(2) For all floating rate loans granted for business purpose to individuals and MSEs,

(3) The Directions at paragraphs 353(1) and 353(2) above shall be applicable

the Indian Contract Act in letter and spirit, and ensure that such repossession clause
is clearly brought to the notice of the borrower at the time of execution of the contract.

The terms and conditions of the contract shall be strictly in terms of the Recovery
Policy and shall contain provisions regarding:
(1) notice period before taking possession,
(2) circumstances under which the notice period can be waived,
(3) the procedure for taking possession of the security,
(4) a provision regarding final chance to be given to the borrower for repayment of
loan before the sale / auction of the property,
(5) the procedure for giving repossession to the borrower, and
(6) the procedure for sale / auction of the property.

Hence, it shall
ensure that its agents engaged for recovery of its dues strictly adhere to the above
instructions, while engaged in the process of recovery of dues.
enriched_requirements.object: engaged for recovery of its dues strictly adhere to the above instructions, while engaged in the process of recovery of dues

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Complaints received by the Reserve Bank regarding violation of the above
instructions and adoption of abusive practices followed by bank's recovery agents
shall be viewed seriously.

Reserve Bank may consider imposing a ban on a bank from
engaging recovery agents in a particular area, either jurisdictional or functional, for a
limited period.
enriched_requirements.object: on a bank from engaging recovery agents in a particular area, either jurisdictional or functional, for a limited period

conditions: In case of persistent breach of the above instructions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of persistent breach of the above instructions, Reserve Bank
may consider extending the period of ban or the area of ban.
enriched_requirements.object: of ban or the area of ban

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure
that its employees also adhere to the above instructions during the loan recovery
process.
enriched_requirements.object: also adhere to the above instructions during the loan recovery process

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank engaging recovery agents shall undertake a periodical review of the
mechanism to learn from experience, to effect improvements, and to bring to the notice
of the Reserve Bank suggestions for improvement in these instructions.

Standing instructions shall be freely accepted on all current and savings bank
accounts.

out schemes in this regard.

All transactions, including payment of interest on deposits / charging of interest
on advances, should be rounded off to the nearest rupee i.e., fractions of 50 paise and
above shall be rounded off to the next higher rupee and fraction of less than 50 paise
shall be ignored.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Issue prices of cash certificates should also be rounded off in the same manner.

fractions of a rupee are not rejected or dishonoured by them.

States under Section 25 of the Negotiable Instruments Act, 1881, the Central
Government has stipulated that the delegation is subject to the condition that the
Central Government may itself exercise the said function, should it deem fit to do so.

required.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With a view to developing strong risk management capabilities to manage agri-
commodity price risk, it is felt that banks shall encourage hedging by the agri-
borrowers by creating awareness amongst them regarding the utility and benefits of
hedging through agri-commodity derivatives.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
At the same time, the bank must keep
the sophistication, understanding, scale of operation and requirements of their agri-
borrower in mind while advising on the availability and use of these instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: scale of operation and requirements of their agri- borrower in mind while advising on the availability and use

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To begin with, the bank may encourage large agricultural borrowers such as
agricultural commodity processors, traders, millers, aggregators, etc., to hedge their
commodity price risk.

about the suitability and appropriateness of using these products for hedging specific
